prestazioni: Upgrade to a **Garrett GTX3071R Gen II turbocharger** (hybrid billet wheel) for the **EA888 Gen3 2.0 TSI (CUPRA code: DNPA)** engine, paired with a **Forge Motorsport high-flow intercooler (FMIC-0008P)** and **034 Motorsport silicone charge pipes (034-101-1002)** to handle 380+ HP on **98 RON fuel** with a **Dynojet 2.75" turbo-back exhaust (CUPRA-specific catless downpipe)**

Install a **Unitronic Stage 2+ ECU/TCU flash (UNI-22220500-S2+)** with **IE Peek Polished Intake Manifold (IE-0010)** and **NGK 97506 (1-step colder) spark plugs** for optimized timing and boost control, alongside a **PTP Turbo Inlet Pipe (PTP-01-002)** to eliminate factory restrictions

Full **034 Motorsport Stage 2 DSG Transmission Package (034-101-1005)** including **DSG TCU tune, upgraded clutch packs (SACHS Performance 3000951634), and a **South Bend Clutch DSG Flywheel (SB-DSG-FW-2.0T)** for launch control and 0.05s faster shifts under 350+ lb-ft torque
estetica: **Rieger Tuning Cupra Ateca widebody kit (Rieger-SEAT-ATECA-WB)** with **custom carbon fiber fenders (25mm extended flares)**, **custom 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap (2080 series)**, and **OEM+ Cupra R-style side skirts (VW Group part #5F0071303B GRU)**

**APR Performance GT250 rear wing (APR-GT-250-SEAT-ATECA)** in **raw carbon fiber** with **adjustable mounts (0-12° angle)** and **custom LED third brake light integration (Osram LEDriving SL 12V)** for OEM+ aesthetics

**BBS FI-R 9.5x19" ET45 wheels (BBS-FIR-19-9.5-ET45-5x112)** in **Gunmetal finish** with **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (255/35/19)**, paired with **H&R Cup Kit lowering springs (H&R-29222-1)** for a **30mm drop** and **CUPRA R-specific red caliper paint (Motip 04070)**
